fact: From day one, we've embraced sustainability — sending tulsi seeds with every order — and we empower young girls to express themselves boldly through accessories. (Verbatim from ishkaara.com/en-us/pages/about-us, confirmed live July 2025–2026)

Ishkaara was born when founder Vidhi Jain, a Delhi University student, couldn't find bold, statement accessories she wanted, so she created them herself. What started as a passion project at college stalls grew into a community of lakhs of customers online. The brand (previously known as Jewelishk) was started in 2019 on campus. The live homepage currently states '3L+ Happy Customers' (i.e., 3 lakh+). Vidhi Jain is confirmed as Founder & CEO. The brand has not raised any funding. Sources: ishkaara.com/en-us/pages/about-us (live, current); ishkaara.com homepage (live, current); Tracxn (July 8, 2025).

A verbatim customer review live on Ishkaara's homepage reads: 'I've been shopping from you since almost a year and I wanted to tell you one thing, this amazing thing you do while sending freebies. I've got freebies with everyyyy order I've placed and that excitement I hold whenever I receive your parcel is unexplainable. I'm more excited to see what freebies you've sent rather than checking the stuff I've ordered.' This appears in Ishkaara's 'Real Reviews. Real Love.' homepage carousel, alongside the brand's currently active tiered gifting mechanic: Free Jewellery Pouch on every order, Free Mystery Jewellery above ₹999, and Free Self-Love Organiser above ₹1,499.

Ishkaara's live About Us page (https://www.ishkaara.com/en-us/pages/about-us) currently states: 'Over the years, Ishkaara has found its way into the spotlight — from reality shows like Bigg Boss, MTV Hustle, and Saregama Pa, to features in Grazia and publications like So Delhi. Our pieces have been styled by icons such as Kareena Kapoor Khan, Ananya Panday, Yo Yo Honey Singh, Neha Kakkar, Sunidhi Chauhan, and Urvashi Rautela, while also making appearances in countless music videos.'
3 Hour Express Delivery in Delhi NCR — displayed as a live site-wide banner across the Ishkaara homepage, all collections pages, and individual product pages on ishkaara.com as of July 17, 2026.

Ishkaara was previously known as 'Jewelishk'. This is confirmed on the brand's own live About Us page: 'Ishkaara, previously known as Jewelishk, was started back in 2019 by a Delhi University student on campus.' The brand's Threads social profile also states 'Previously known as Jewelishk 💯' in its current bio.
